zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前ETH/美元处于窄幅震荡结构，价格围绕1730至1745区间运行，短线多次受制于SMA20均线1743附近，整体动能略偏弱，反弹持续性不足。

MACD指标持续位于零轴下方约-6.67，空头动能仍占优势；均线系统呈现压制状态，价格未能有效站上1743一带，说明反弹仍属修复性质。

下方关键支撑位关注1729附近，若跌破或将测试1715区域；上方阻力集中在1745及1755，突破需放量确认趋势反转信号。

建议短线以区间交易为主，1730附近可轻仓试多，上方1745-1755分批止盈；若跌破1729则应控制仓位并顺势跟空，等待趋势确认。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently consolidating within a tight intraday range after a modest pullback from recent highs. Price action around 1736 suggests a neutral-to-slightly bearish bias as the market struggles to reclaim the 20-period moving average. Momentum appears to be fading, with buyers lacking conviction above 1740 while sellers defend upper levels. Overall structure leans sideways with a mild downward tilt unless breakout occurs above nearby resistance.

Technical indicators reinforce a cautious stance. Price is trading slightly below the 20-period SMA at 1743.40, signaling short-term weakness. The MACD reading at -6.676 indicates bearish momentum dominance, though the lack of a signal line prevents full confirmation of crossover dynamics. With RSI unavailable, momentum strength is less clear, but price behavior suggests limited bullish pressure and ongoing consolidation under resistance.

Immediate support is located at the recent low near 1729.70, where buyers previously stepped in to stabilize price action. A break below this level could expose the 1720 zone and potentially extend losses toward 1700. On the upside, resistance sits at 1743–1745, aligned with the SMA20 and intraday high. A decisive move above this band would be required to shift bias back toward bullish continuation.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound approach until a clear breakout emerges. Short-term traders may consider selling into resistance near 1743–1745 with tight risk controls, while dip buyers can look for reactions around 1729 support. However, confirmation is essential before positioning aggressively, as momentum remains weak. A sustained break above resistance could trigger upside continuation, whereas loss of support may open deeper corrective downside pressure toward lower psychological levels.
